items: Output preserves the three-section structure of the panel.
Output identifies at least two concrete current problems before proposing changes.
Output makes section headers visually distinct from field labels with specific size, weight, color, or spacing changes.
Output makes spacing between sections clearly larger than spacing within a section.
Output keeps labels above inputs and explicitly associates them with inputs or accessible field wrappers.
Output states that the result remains a refine rather than a redesign, or includes a self-check confirming that boundary.
Output does not introduce a new component library.
Output does not add new outer card wrappers around the existing section containers.
Output stays within React + Next.js + Tailwind CSS v3 and uses the existing component model.
Output proposes only reversible refinement-scope changes rather than structural replacement.
